theme.description: High contrast, technical, and authoritative. Designed for B2B industrial automotive chemical buyers. Emphasizes clarity, bulk data, and performance.

typography.heading_style: uppercase, tracking-tight, font-bold for H1/H2 to give a heavy industrial stamp feel.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Strict grid hierarchy with visible 1px borders representing a structural, technical catalog.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px) to rounded-md (6px) max. Avoid overly round shapes to maintain the industrial/B2B edge.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm, high contrast text. Primary CTA uses the Industrial Orange (#F97316) with White text. Hover states must darken.
components.cards: Flat background (surface_alt or white), 1px solid border (border/40), NO shadow by default. Hover: slight drop-shadow-md and border darkens.
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with a 1px bottom border. Must include bold logo and clear B2B navigation links.
components.tables: Dense, technical feel. Zebra striping or clear 1px bottom borders for rows. Small, tabular lining numbers.

interactions_motion.hover: Opacity changes for text, subtle background shifts for rows, -translate-y-1 for product cards.

homepage.hero: Dark, high-contrast hero section. bg-accent_dark (#0F172A) with text-white. Use the hero image with a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text pops. Include industrial badges/stats.
homepage.featured_products: Bento-style or strict technical grid. Each product card shows technical specs, volume variants (2L, 5L, 500ml), and a quick 'Add to Cart / RFQ' button.
homepage.about: A split layout (text left, image right) showcasing the manufacturing precision.

product_catalog.layout: Sidebar for facets/filters (Categories: Dashboard, Tyre, Car, Bike). Main grid for products.
product_catalog.product_card: Focus on clarity. Display SKU, exact chemical name, and a variant selector (Select dropdown) directly on the card for quick B2B ordering.

checkout_form.layout: Strict, form-based Shadcn components. Split screen: Left is Order Summary, Right is Dealer Info form. Professional, no distractions.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Strict sidebar, dense top stats row (grid-cols-4), and a large data table for Orders.
admin_dashboard.orders_table: Use Shadcn Table. Include Status Badge (Pending, Packed, Dispatched, Delivered) with appropriate colors.

images.description: Man meticulously polishing a car, showcasing precision in an automotive workshop. Use with dark overlay.
Empty, rustic car workshop showcasing the industrial roots and scale of the business.
Close-up of various car care spray bottles. Use this as a fallback/representative image for products.
Red and black power tool / abstract industrial texture for footer or banner background.

icons.style: Technical, consistent stroke width (1.5px or 2px), not overly playful.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid="add-to-cart-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: The frontend project uses .js files, NOT .tsx files. Write all React components using standard JSX in .js files.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the E-commerce UI as a mobile-first, high-contrast 'Technical Grid'. Do not use soft, friendly SaaS aesthetics. Use sharp or slightly rounded corners (max rounded-md).
For the Admin Dashboard, use Shadcn UI components extensively (Tables, Select, Cards, Dialogs) but strip out any default 'Vercel-like' soft shadows. Replace with flat 1px borders.
Ensure the hero section on the homepage has a dark background and the image overlay does not exceed bg-black/50.
Implement the variant selection (2L, 5L, 500ml) clearly on the product cards to facilitate bulk B2B purchases.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, form inputs, and key UI elements as per the testing rules.
